prompt:
A soft watercolor shoujo manga-style illustration of a beautiful adult female fantasy adventurer dining alone in a cozy rustic Italian restaurant. She is shown from the waist up at a wooden table, centered in the frame, with long flowing golden blonde hair, delicate features, and a dreamy romantic expression, resting her cheek against one gloved hand while holding a fork in the other. She wears blue fantasy clothing with brown leather armor on the shoulders and chest, fitted long sleeves, and a low-cut white inner garment, styled like an RPG heroine but painted with elegant, feminine shoujo manga sensibility. In front of her is a white plate of spaghetti with tomato sauce, grated cheese, and exactly 2 basil leaves on top, with a small forkful of noodles lifted upward. On the table there is exactly 1 white pasta plate, exactly 1 drinking glass in the lower left foreground, and exactly 1 greenish wine bottle in a wicker holder on the lower right. The background is a warm sunlit trattoria interior rendered in loose transparent watercolor washes, with exactly 1 chalkboard menu on the left reading Menu
Spaghetti
Carbonara
Bolognese
Vongole
Tiramisu
Vino, exactly 5 colored bottles on a shelf beneath it, exactly 2 framed wall pictures, exactly 1 hanging lamp in the upper right, and a bright window area with flowers. Use textured paper grain, soft sepia outlines, warm beige and honey lighting, gentle painterly bleed, romantic atmosphere, vertical composition, and the polished look of a high-end少女漫画 watercolor illustration.
